offer: For logistics operations managers processing 10–50 shipments/week, inefficient routing causes delayed deliveries. We optimize fleet routing instead of manual scheduling and routing.
problem: Inefficient routing leads to delayed deliveries.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics managers
Indie Hackers discussions on logistics workflows

Community forums for sharing logistics tools

Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
